title: rosa spinosissima f. pimpinellifolia
intro: Rosa spinosissima f. pimpinellifolia, also known as the Burnet Rose, is a species of rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa spinosissima f. pimpinellifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in water or oil.
